title: Create: Dragons Plus
description: Provide convenient features to players and dev utilities for Create addon developers.
body:
Welcome to **Create: Dragons Plus**. It provides convenient features to players and dev utilities for Create addon developers.

### We currently offer:
* **Bulk Coloring**: Use **Dye Fluids** with Encased Fan to dye items, supports most Crafting recipes with dyes.
* **Bulk Freezing**: Use **Powder Snow** with Encased Fan to freeze items.
* **Bulk Ending**: Use **Dragon Head** or **Dragon's Breath (Fluid)** with Encased Fan to infuse items with energy from The End.
* **Bulk Sanding**: Use [**Quicksand**](https://modrinth.com/mod/quicksand-neoforge) with Encased Fan to polish items, supports all Sand Paper Polishing recipes. (After 1.8.5, if block tag of Bulk Sanding contains any block, Bulk Sanding will be activated. Quicksand is not a requirement for this feature anymore)
* **Fluid Hatch**: Like the Item Hatch, provides convinient take/deposit operation on Fluid Tanks.

### Mod Integration:
* Bulk Processing Air Current from **Simulated Contraption** of **Create: Simulated series** can interact with block.
* **Fragile Fluid Tank** & **Levitite Fragile Fluid Tank**: Tank that breaks on impact. (Need **Create: Simulated series**)
* Bulk Coloring & Bulk Freezing supports **Create: Granished**'s Fan Processing Recipes.
* Bulk Ending, Bulk Sanding & Bulk Freezing supports **Create: Dreams & Desires**'s Fan Processing Recipes. Industrial Fan is supported.
* Bring **Bulk Enchanting** to **The Aether**. It supports aether enchanting recipes, repairing recipe and incubating Moa Egg. 
* Bulk Freezing supports Freezer recipes of **The Aether**.
* Liquid Dye and Bulk Coloring support dyes from **Dye Depot**, **Dyenamics** and Bleachdew from **Arts & Crafts**.
 
**All features can be enabled/disabled, unless it's forcibly enabled/disabled by depandent mods.**

If you are a modpack author and need more information, please [**check this**](https://github.com/DragonsPlusMinecraft/CreateDragonsPlus/blob/main/MODPACK_README.md).
